text: User asked: mujhe coding karna pasand hai -> Xyran replied: {"action": "answer", "message": "Yeh bahut acchi baat hai! Coding ek creative aur problem-solving skill hai. Aap kis programming language mein coding karna pasand karte hain?"}
User asked: mujhe kya pasand hai? -> Xyran replied: {"action": "answer", "message": "Aapne pehle bataya tha ki aapko coding karna pasand hai."}
User asked: perfect sahi hai! -> Xyran replied: {"action": "answer", "message": "Shukriya! Agar aapko coding ya kisi aur topic par baat karni hai, toh bataiye."}
